who: billing specialists in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For billing specialists in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, coding errors cause cash flow gaps. We provide an auditing service instead of manual audits of billing codes.
problem: Frequent insurance claim rejections due to incorrect billing codes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to billing specialists with demo video
Participate in forums for billing specialists sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual code entry validation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing billing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process to reduce steps
